title: Built with Claude Code: pidgin.sh — let Claude share artifacts as URLs
summary: I kept running into the same friction with Claude Code: it'd generate something nice (an HTML mockup, a report, a plot, a one-pager) and then I'd have to manually save it, find somewhere to host it, and send a link. So I built pidgin.sh , a service plus an agent skill that lets Claude upload a file and hand back a public URL in one step. What it does You install the pidgin-share skill (npx skills add pidgin-sh/skills -g — works in Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, etc.). Ask Claude: "share this file a
